action.reasoning: Observation: CLIP-ViT improves bal_acc to 0.5657 (from 0.363), val_acc=0.816 but rare classes still poor (squirrel=0.036, bobcat=0.193, bird=0.259, rabbit=0.37). Training curve shows steady val improvement. Analysis: Domain shift severe; class imbalance not fully mitigated by weights alone, augments insufficient for generalization. Decision: Switch to WeightedRandomSampler + label smoothing + no class-weighted loss, add RandAugment for stronger regularization, use val balanced_accuracy for best checkpoint selection (via sklearn), lower LR=1e-5, 20 epochs, batch=64. Submit eval to track. This targets rare classes and robustness within time (~20min/iter).
